name: Robinhood
ai_strategy_summary: Cortex AI is Robinhood's conversational investment intelligence platform, rolling out to Gold subscribers in early 2026. While targeting retail investors today, the expectation risk is significant: the next generation of wealth clients will expect this level of AI-native interaction as a baseline.
headline_initiative: Cortex AI for Robinhood Gold subscribers

client_personalization.headline: Cortex Digests: AI-generated personalized portfolio analysis
client_personalization.detail: Cortex Digests provide personalized AI analysis of user portfolios, drawing on real-time market data, analyst reports, and Wall Street research. Launching for Gold members Q1 2026.
evidence: Cortex rolling out to Gold subscribers early 2026
Real-time market data + analyst reports integration
client_personalization.jpm_implication: When today's Robinhood user inherits wealth, they will expect AI-native portfolio insights as baseline. This sets the expectation floor.

investment_portfolio.headline: Natural language custom indicator builder and market scanning
investment_portfolio.detail: Cortex allows users to build custom trading indicators using natural language commands and scan markets in real-time — capabilities previously only available to institutional traders.
investment_portfolio.jpm_implication: Robinhood is democratizing institutional-grade investment tools. Self-directed clients will migrate to platforms offering AI-native tools.

new_business_models.headline: Cortex as premium subscription tier ($5/month Gold add-on)
new_business_models.detail: Robinhood is monetizing AI through a tiered subscription model, bundling Cortex with Gold membership. This creates recurring AI revenue and increases platform stickiness.
new_business_models.jpm_implication: AI as a premium product tier is a viable business model. JPM self-directed and Chase platforms should consider AI feature tiering.
